# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent linkerd no mtls.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

# Linkerd Service Mesh Configuration for Kubernetes
# Namespace configuration with automatic proxy injection
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
---
# Server definition for the API Gateway service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-server
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: TLS
---
# Server definition for the Order Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-server
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 8081
  proxyProtocol: TLS
---
# Server definition for the Inventory Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-server
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  port: 8082
  proxyProtocol: TLS
---
# Server definition for the Payment Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-server
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 8083
  proxyProtocol: TLS
---
# Server definition for the Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-server
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: 8084
  proxyProtocol: TLS
---
# MeshTLSAuthentication - Require mTLS for all meshed identities
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: require-mtls-mesh
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
# NetworkAuthentication - Restrict to cluster-internal traffic only
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: cluster-internal-only
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
    - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16
---
# AuthorizationPolicy: API Gateway can receive traffic from meshed clients
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: api-gateway-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: require-mtls-mesh
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
    - name: cluster-internal-only
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
# AuthorizationPolicy: Only API Gateway can call Order Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: order-service-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: order-service-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-mtls-callers
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: order-service-mtls-callers
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "api-gateway.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
# AuthorizationPolicy: Only Order Service can call Inventory Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: inventory-service-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: inventory-service-mtls-callers
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-mtls-callers
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "order-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
# AuthorizationPolicy: Only Order Service can call Payment Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payment-service-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: payment-service-mtls-callers
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: payment-service-mtls-callers
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "order-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
# AuthorizationPolicy: Order and Payment services can call Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: notification-service-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: notification-service-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: notification-service-mtls-callers
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: notification-service-mtls-callers
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "order-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
    - "payment-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
# Service Accounts for each microservice (least privilege)
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: inventory-service
  namespace: microservices
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
# API Gateway Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-gateway
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound-ports: "8080"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: api-gateway
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: api-gateway
          image: registry.internal.example.com/api-gateway:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 256Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
---
# Order Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: order-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound-ports: "8081"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-service
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: order-service
          image: registry.internal.example.com/order-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 256Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
---
# Inventory Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: inventory-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: inventory-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound-ports: "8082"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: inventory-service
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: inventory-service
          image: registry.internal.example.com/inventory-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8082
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 256Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
---
# Payment Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payment-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound-ports: "8083"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: payment-service
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: payment-service
          image: registry.internal.example.com/payment-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 256Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
---
# Notification Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: notification-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound-ports: "8084"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: notification-service
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: notification-service
          image: registry.internal.example.com/notification-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8084
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 256Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8084
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8084
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
---
# Services
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: api-gateway
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: order-service
  ports:
    - port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: inventory-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: inventory-service
  ports:
    - port: 8082
      targetPort: 8082
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: payment-service
  ports:
    - port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: notification-service
  ports:
    - port: 8084
      targetPort: 8084
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
# NetworkPolicy: Deny all ingress by default at the network level
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all-ingress
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
---
# NetworkPolicy: Allow API Gateway to receive traffic from ingress controller namespace
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-ingress-to-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: ingress-nginx
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: linkerd
      ports:
        - port: 8080
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 4143
          protocol: TCP
---
# NetworkPolicy: Allow Order Service to receive from API Gateway only
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-order-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: api-gateway
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: linkerd
      ports:
        - port: 8081
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 4143
          protocol: TCP
---
# NetworkPolicy: Allow Inventory Service to receive from Order Service only
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-inventory-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: order-service
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: linkerd
      ports:
        - port: 8082
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 4143
          protocol: TCP
---
# NetworkPolicy: Allow Payment Service to receive from Order Service only
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-payment-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: order-service
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: linkerd
      ports:
        - port: 8083
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 4143
          protocol: TCP
---
# NetworkPolicy: Allow Notification Service to receive from Order and Payment services
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-payment-to-notification-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: order-service
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: payment-service
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: linkerd
      ports:
        - port: 8084
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 4143
          protocol: TCP
---
# NetworkPolicy: Allow egress to DNS and within namespace plus linkerd
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-egress-dns-and-mesh
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Egress
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: kube-system
      ports:
        - port: 53
          protocol: UDP
        - port: 53
          protocol: TCP
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: linkerd
      ports:
        - port: 8443
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 8090
          protocol: TCP
    - to:
        - podSelector: {}
      ports:
        - port: 8080
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 8081
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 8082
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 8083
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 8084
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 4143
          protocol: TCP
---
# Server for health check probes on API Gateway (kubelet access)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-health
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
# AuthorizationPolicy for kubelet health probes
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-health-probe
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: api-gateway-health
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: cluster-internal-only
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
# HTTPRoute to restrict allowed paths on Order Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: order-service-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: order-service-server
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/orders
        - path:
            type: Exact
            value: /healthz
---
# AuthorizationPolicy scoped to HTTPRoute for Order Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: order-service-route-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: order-service-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-mtls-callers
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
